Say:Footnote-1 “I seek refugeFootnote-2 with the Lord of the rising day;Footnote-3
from the evil of all that He created;Footnote-4
from the evil of night's darkness when it spreads around;Footnote-5
from the evil of the women who blow on knots;Footnote-6
and from the evil of the envier when he envies.”Footnote-7
